title: zenobia cassinefolia
intro: Zenobia cassinefolia, also known as Cassine, is a shrub native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Zenobia cassinefolia include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues like bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Zenobia cassinefolia typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be applied topically or ingested in moderation under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
